title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Delhi Special Police Establishment Act, 1946. (2) It extends to the whole of India 1***.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" which were subs. by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Schedule, for "except Part B State" omitted by Act 62 of 1956, s. 2 and the Sch.
